allow: Bash(bash -c 'payload=$\(cat\); ts=$\(/bin/date +%FT%T%z\); echo "[$ts] raw: $payload" >> /tmp/tutor-hook.log; file=$\(echo "$payload" | /opt/homebrew/bin/jq -r ".tool_input.file_path"\); echo "[$ts] file=$file" >> /tmp/tutor-hook.log; echo "$file" | /usr/bin/grep -q "/\\.claude/skills/tutor/docs/" && /usr/bin/osascript -e "display notification \\"Lesson saved\\" with title \\"/tutor\\""')
